connectorUiConfig.title: SailPoint IdentityNow (Serverless)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The [SailPoint IdentityNow](https://www.sailpoint.com/) data connector provides the capability to ingest SailPoint IdentityNow search events into Microsoft Sentinel through the REST API. The connector provides customers the ability to extract audit information from their IdentityNow tenant, bringing user activity and governance events into Microsoft Sentinel to improve insights from your security incident and event monitoring solution.

**Note:** This is a serverless connector using Azure native data collection mechanisms (DCR/DCE).

sampleQueries.query:
{{graphQueriesTableName}}
 | where Action contains 'AUTH'
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc
 | take 100

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.
Read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required.

customs.name: SailPoint IdentityNow API Credentials
customs.description: **Tenant ID**, **Client ID**, and **Client Secret** are required for SailPoint IdentityNow API authentication. Follow the [SailPoint documentation](https://community.sailpoint.com/t5/IdentityNow-Articles/Best-Practice-Using-Personal-Access-Tokens-in-IdentityNow/ta-p/150471) to obtain these credentials.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Obtain SailPoint IdentityNow API Credentials
instructionSteps.description:
Follow the [SailPoint IdentityNow documentation](https://community.sailpoint.com/t5/IdentityNow-Articles/Best-Practice-Using-Personal-Access-Tokens-in-IdentityNow/ta-p/150471) to create API credentials.

You will need:
- **Tenant ID**: Your SailPoint IdentityNow tenant identifier
- **Client ID**: OAuth2 client identifier
- **Client Secret**: OAuth2 client secret

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure the SailPoint IdentityNow Data Connector
instructionSteps.description: Enter the required information below and click **Connect** to establish the connection.
